snippet: **IMPORTANT NOTE:** Due to uneven disclosure, it is **NOT appropriate** to make state-by-state or jurisdiction-by-jurisdiction comparisons. For more details on the state of disclosure when it comes to economic development incentives, [read this report](https://goodjobsfirst.org/financial-exposure-rating-the-states-on-economic-development-transparency/)
